summary: Comprehensive testing of superadmin functionality and role-based features completed. All core superadmin features working correctly including role management, student management, and dashboard differentiation.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Capacity validation test shows unexpected behavior during bulk registration testing
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Capacity limit hit earlier than expected in test scenario
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Core functionality works, isolated to test edge case

Superadmin role verification and dashboard access

Superadmin can access /admin/leerlingen page successfully
Superadmin can add a student manually through the UI

Student autocomplete functionality working after adding students
Users management page accessible to superadmin
Superadmin can view all user roles including superadmin option
Role-based access control - superadmin vs admin vs teacher permissions
Dashboard stats show full information for superadmin/admin users
Teacher login and simplified dashboard functionality

Student search and autocomplete API endpoints
Registration form with student autocomplete integration
Navigation between admin pages
